experiment: separate-teacher distillation — does a STRONGER teacher (gpt2-xl) train a small core better than self-distillation?
finding: a stronger teacher HURTS a capacity-bound small core: XL-distill ΔNLL +3.4 (bad model, ~30% of XL) vs self-distill +0.77 (good medium model). The student is bounded by its architecture; chasing the stronger teacher degrades it. Rank 256->512 nudged XL-agreement only 27->31% — sizing-for-teacher within the medium arch cannot reach XL.
